programme.title: Operation: Endgame
programme.desc: A battle ensues among groups of government spy teams in an underground facility after the boss is assassinated

programme.title: One in the Chamber
programme.desc: A seasoned assassin plays both sides in a Russian gang war and becomes the target of an unknown enemy.

programme.title: Attack on the Queen
programme.desc: Two estranged brothers must put their long-standing feud behind them in order to stop a group of terrorists.

programme.title: Unstable
programme.desc: After a woman finds a man she thinks to be her soul mate, strange things start to happen in her life.

programme.title: Ricochet
programme.desc: A detective is caught up in the lives of a judge and his wife who are linked to a man with criminal leanings.

programme.title: Hide
programme.desc: In Boston, a detective is put on a grisly case involving six mysterious mummified bodies.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Five years after her husband was killed in a car accident, Linda has picked up the pieces and moved on.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Alan is a cutter, someone who edits over people's recorded histories. His latest assignment puts him in danger

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: A bank clerk finds his life suddenly changed after a train accident threatens to reveal his biggest secret.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Two LA detectives are dispatched to a town where the sun doesn't set to investigate the murder of a local teen

programme.title: Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels
programme.desc: When four criminals lose a rigged poker game against a kingpin, he gives them one week to settle their debt.

programme.title: The Fourth Angel
programme.desc: Jack watched as his family was murdered and the killers are set free, so he takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: A lieutenant general and a colonel face opposition after ordering a drone strike to take out suicide bombers.

programme.title: Light of My Life
programme.desc: A father and child journey through the outskirts of society after a pandemic wipes out half the population.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
